Assembly: The assembly drPruAviu1.hap1.1 is based on 98x PacBio data and Arima2 Hi-C data generated by the Darwin Tree of Life Project~(https://www.darwintreeoflife.org/). The assembly process included the following sequence of steps: initial PacBio assembly generation with Hifiasm in Hi-C integrated assembly mode, and Hi-C based scaffolding with YaHS. The mitochondrial and chloroplast genomes were assembled using OATK. Finally, each haplotype assembly was analysed and manually improved using TreeVal. Chromosome-scale scaffolds are named by synteny based on Prunus avium GCA_013416215.1. The order and orientation of the following regions is uncertain:Chromosome 1 between approximately 28.1-32.9MbChromosome 4 between approximately 15.3-19.7MbChromosome 5 between approximately 12.8-17.9Mb.

Assembly: The assembly ilPedCont1.hap1.1 is based on 71x PacBio data and Arima2 Hi-C data generated by Project Psyche (https://www.projectpsyche.org/). The assembly process included the following sequence of steps: initial PacBio assembly generation with Hifiasm in Hi-C integrated assembly mode, and Hi-C based scaffolding with YaHS. The mitochondrial genome was assembled using MitoHiFi. Finally, each haplotype assembly was analysed and manually improved using TreeVal. Chromosome-scale scaffolds confirmed by the Hi-C data have been named in order of size. Z chromosome identified based BUSCO gene painting with ancestral Merian elements~(https://doi.org/10.1038/s41559-024-02329-4).

Assembly: The assembly ilPlaCeru1.hap1.1 is based on 82x PacBio data and Arima2 Hi-C data generated by the Darwin Tree of Life Project~(https://www.darwintreeoflife.org/). The assembly process included the following sequence of steps: initial PacBio assembly generation with Hifiasm in Hi-C integrated assembly mode, and Hi-C based scaffolding with YaHS. The mitochondrial genome was assembled using MitoHiFi. Finally, each haplotype assembly was analysed and manually improved using TreeVal. Chromosome-scale scaffolds confirmed by the Hi-C data have been named in order of size. Z chromosome identified based BUSCO gene painting with ancestral Merian elements (https://doi.org/10.1038/s41559-024-02329-4). The exact order and orientation of the contigs on chromosome 12 (0-1.25 Mbp) and chromosome 24 (8.2-9.96 Mbp) is unknown.
